description: Baseline: Lighthouse perf=93, LCP=2323ms, SI=4392ms, TBT=183ms
Remove unused Gabarito font + Fredoka weight 300. Saves ~30KB font payload. Perf 93→96, SI 4392→3108
Add next.config optimizePackageImports for framer-motion/lucide-react, compression, cache headers. Perf 96→99, TBT 155→20, SI 3108→2451
Verification run, no changes. Score variance: 96 (was 99 last run). Confirms Lighthouse noise.
Reduce star count 120→60, add will-change/contain to glass-panel, fix font-mono ref. Perf=98, LCP=2264, SI=2628
Strip unused CSS theme vars (sidebar, chart, popover, etc), remove unused keyframes (glow, drift, bounce-gentle, shooting-star, spin-slow). CSS -2KB. TBT=8ms, FCP=1151ms
Add contain:strict to SpaceBackground, poweredByHeader:false. Perf=99, LCP=2091, SI=2501
Remove drop-shadow filter from LCP h1, add will-change to animations. Perf=99, consistent LCP=2051, SI=2491
Add content-visibility:auto to below-fold SEO sections. Score=98 (no improvement), LCP=2240 (worse). Noise or regression.
